_comment: SINGLE SOURCE for MCP servers. Each adapter renders its harness's native format. transport is 'http' (url) or 'stdio' (command+args). 'auth' marks a server needing a secret; Claude gets it via a headersHelper script, Copilot/OpenCode via a ${env}/{env:} header. Per-harness opt-out via e.g. "opencode": {"enabled": false}.
